nodes.label: Recurring hygiene sweep ritual
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FABLED 2/3 - FABLED 2 — Optimization Plan.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: A recurring 90-minute non-feature slot gives accumulated micro-debt a durable time home.

nodes.label: Vault-wide relative-link checker
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FABLED 2/3 - FABLED 2 — Optimization Plan.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Extending the existing markdown scanner lets a rename fail the commit that caused broken links.

nodes.label: Campaign-checklist precedence rule
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FABLED 2/3 - FABLED 2 — Optimization Plan.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Campaign file 4 becomes the authoritative queue; reviews supply promoted items and weekly plans reference rather than duplicate them.

nodes.label: FABLED generation lifecycle rule
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FABLED 2/3 - FABLED 2 — Optimization Plan.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Frozen generations plus one delta pass per campaign end prevent the current deep-dive layer from rotting like FABLED v1.
